title: ShulkerContentCraft
description: A spigot plugin that can craft items with contents inside shulkerboxes
body:
ShulkerContentCraft is a plugin that allow player craft items by the contents inside shulker box.
Players can put shulker boxes in shape of the original crafting recipe to do crafting in the unit of shulker box.
This plugin can save time from continuous crafting.

- This plugin will automatically enable to all players


Requirements
---
- Full shulker box
- Only shulker boxes in crafting table
- Empty shulker box for extra filling

Examples
---
![Crafting Blaze powder](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UXv6QDMo/images/7b4358385684f9bb27c847626ccca3f51b6a0306.gif)
![Crafting Ender eye](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/UXv6QDMo/images/dde6d50ef2eb1106afa7ed6d110293e3185d417a.gif)
---

Cautions of Usage
---
```
Supported Recipes
- stackables (except glass pane, iron bars, rails)
- enough to store within 9 slots of shulker boxes
- custom recipes

Unsupported Recipes (some might able to craft)
- Shulker Box
- unstackables (tools, minecarts, boats)
- nbt-containing items (fireworks, firework star, custom items)
- tool repairing

Some combination of items might leads to extra/fewer usage of material (calculation remainder)
```
